description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a woodgrain finish and a sturdy metal frame. The front features two large sliding doors on the left and three stacked drawers on the right, each with sleek, horizontal handles. Above the main storage compartments is an open shelf that runs the length of the cabinet, providing additional space for display or easy-access items. The sides and top showcase a continuous wood pattern, while the legs are thin and metallic, elevating the cabinet slightly off the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways. The cabinet's construction suggests a combination of engineered wood and metal, offering both durability and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern woodgrain cabinet with metal frame, featuring sliding doors, drawers, and an open shelf. Its minimalist design and sturdy build make it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding doors, three drawers with handles, and a long open shelf above.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the woodgrain side panel, thin metal legs, and the depth of the open shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain woodgrain back panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, highlighting the continuous woodgrain and open shelf depth.
